system.label: Hotel booking & arrivals admin
system.painHero: Room blocks and banquet inquiries land on Messenger and email — see occupancy and VIP arrivals in one place.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive luxury hotel marketing site only (rooms & dining highlights, gallery, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial sent 2026-07-20 via outreachSchedule to manila.grand@hyatt.com; auto follow-ups 3d1w (max 4).

sources.address: 8th Avenue corner 35th Street, Bonifacio Global City, Taguig, Philippines
sources.tagline: Embracing the #LivingGrand philosophy, we bring moments of more to everything that we do.
sources.notes: HD cover 2048×1638 from Facebook; logo 386×386; gallery dining/lifestyle 1365×2048 + tower crops from cover. Official Hyatt page timed out on fetch — contact confirmed via FB About.
